page.title: Environment variables
page.tagline: Secrets configured across each agent — process env, MCP tool servers, and the runtime gateway.
page.search_placeholder: Search agents, variables or MCP servers…
page.empty_hint: Keys configured on an agent appear here — its process env (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), each MCP server's env (e.g. TAVILY_API_KEY), and the runtime gateway token. Configure them from the agent's settings.
page.no_matches: No agents or variables match your search.
page.load_error: Couldn't load environment variables. Try refreshing.
page.forbidden_hint: Only workspace owners and admins can view environment variables.
page.masked_hint: Values are hidden. Per-agent keys are configured from each agent's Environment, MCP Config and Runtime Config settings; the workspace shared variables below are editable here.
page.section_process_hint: Editable in this agent's Environment tab
page.section_mcp_hint: Set in this agent's MCP Config — not the Environment tab

shared.title: Workspace shared
shared.hint: Injected into every agent, beneath each agent's own variables (an agent's own key with the same name wins).
shared.intro: Set a key once for the whole workspace — e.g. a shared TAVILY_API_KEY.
